headline_summary: US-Israeli air campaign against Iran entered day six with intensified strikes reported in Tehran
Iran threatened retaliation beyond the Gulf after the US said it sank an Iranian warship off Sri Lanka
Iranian state TV was hacked to air opposition figure Reza Pahlavi, highlighting intensifying information operations
Strait of Hormuz disruption risk remains central for energy prices, tanker availability, and war-risk insurance premia
US military signaled strikes will expand deeper inland in Iran as Iran’s missile launch tempo reportedly declines
risk_drivers: Escalatory US/Israel strike tempo and stated intent to expand targets inland
Iran retaliation threats against Americans globally
Persistent shipping/insurance disruption risk around the Strait of Hormuz
Domestic instability in Iran after the killing of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and uncertain succession

Energy: Upside skew to crude and refined products on Hormuz disruption and tanker insurance constraints (oil_up_risk)
Higher freight and war-risk premia for tankers/LNG cargoes; potential rationing effects for import-dependent Asia
FX: Risk-off episodes likely to support USD and safe-haven FX; pressure on EM/high-beta FX (em_fx_pressure, risk_off_flows)
Rates: Flight-to-quality can pull core yields lower; oil shock raises inflation-risk and credit spread sensitivity (rates_credit_spreads)
Equities: Higher energy and shipping costs weigh on transport/consumer cyclicals; defense/energy may outperform

sources.title: Bombing of Tehran intensifies as war enters day six
US says Iran firing fewer missiles, US strikes to expand inland

events.title: Vessel traffic through Strait of Hormuz nearly halted; ~300 tankers stranded
events.implication: Throughput shock for crude/LNG; war-risk premia and freight/insurance surge (oil_up_risk).

events.title: Blast damages Bahamas-flagged tanker Sonangol Namibe near Khor al Zubair port
events.implication: Highlights spillover of Gulf conflict into Iraqi export infrastructure; raises disruption risk.

events.title: Turkey says NATO air defences destroyed a ballistic missile fired from Iran headed into Turkish airspace; debris reported in Hatay area
events.implication: Potential widening to a NATO member raises escalation tail-risk and supports risk_off_flows and em_fx_pressure.

events.title: COSCO Shipping suspends new bookings for Middle East routes
events.implication: Booking suspensions reflect escalating operational constraints that can compound trade delays and freight inflation.

events.title: Rare tanker transit to load Murban crude via Strait of Hormuz amid shipping disruption (Pola to Jebel Dhanna)
events.implication: Suggests partial/episodic navigation but under elevated operational risk; volatility in flows persists.

events.title: Israel orders evacuation of a swathe of southern Lebanon including Tyre; Israeli strike hits building in Baalbek
events.implication: Lebanon theatre escalation broadens regional conflict footprint; increases risk-off flows and local operational disruption.

events.title: Israel orders evacuation across swathe of south Lebanon as hostilities with Hezbollah escalate
events.implication: Second front increases geopolitical tail risk and risk-off sentiment, though direct oil flow impact is indirect.

events.title: Israel orders evacuation across parts of southern Lebanon amid Hezbollah hostilities
events.implication: A widening Lebanon front increases tail risk of broader regional escalation and additional disruption to Eastern Mediterranean energy/logistics.

events.title: Israel orders evacuation of swathe of southern Lebanon as hostilities with Hezbollah intensify; strike in Baalbek reported
events.implication: Escalation in Lebanon increases regional conflict premium and adds to risk-off dynamics.

events.title: IRGC claims control of Strait of Hormuz; U.S. discusses potential naval escorts for tankers (as reported)
events.implication: Heightened risk of incidents/miscalculation around escort operations; supports oil_up_risk and risk_off_flows.

events.title: Multiple commercial vessels damaged by projectiles near Fujairah and the northern Strait of Hormuz
events.implication: Physical damage and crew evacuations increase risk premia and likely deter transits.

events.title: U.S. strike reported to hit Iranian warship far from Gulf amid widening conflict
events.implication: Signals escalation scope; increases tail risk of wider maritime confrontation and retaliation.

events.title: Qatar LNG shipments disrupted; force majeure declared amid reported attacks on facilities
events.implication: LNG export outages compound Hormuz shipping issues; supports global gas prices.

events.title: Iraq reported cutting oil production as storage fills due to inability to load tankers
events.implication: Upstream curtailments turn logistics disruption into real supply loss.

events.title: U.S. signals naval escorts/insurance support to sustain Middle East energy exports
events.implication: Policy support may partially offset disruption but also underscores severity of shipping risk.

events.title: Israeli strike reported hitting building in Baalbek amid Lebanon escalation
events.implication: Sustained strikes raise risk of broader escalation and market risk-off.

events.title: Qatar declares force majeure on LNG exports amid Gulf conflict
events.implication: LNG supply shock risks higher European/Asian gas prices; supports energy complex.

events.title: Strait of Hormuz vessel traffic sharply reduced; US discusses naval escorts for tankers
events.implication: Immediate tail-risk to crude/LNG flows and war-risk premia; supports oil_up_risk and risk_off_flows.

events.title: US Senate rejects war-powers measure aimed at halting attacks against Iran
events.implication: Signals reduced near-term legislative constraint on US operations; may prolong risk premium in energy and risk assets.

events.title: U.S. banks on heightened alert for Iran-linked cyberattacks as war escalates
events.implication: Increased cyber-defense posture may coincide with elevated market plumbing risk and risk-off sentiment.

events.title: Iranian missiles hit central Israel (Tel Aviv district impacts reported)
events.implication: Direct Iran-Israel kinetic exchange increases escalation risk and broadens risk-off impulse.

events.title: Saudi Aramco attempts to reroute crude exports to Yanbu to bypass Hormuz; pipeline/Red Sea constraints highlighted
events.implication: Rerouting alleviates some supply risk but raises freight costs and shifts risk to Red Sea routes.

events.title: Saudi Arabia considers diverting crude exports to Red Sea terminals to bypass Hormuz
events.implication: Rerouting can reduce Hormuz dependence but faces capacity/shipping constraints; supports freight premia.

events.title: Energy prices surge as Hormuz disruption persists; Iraq output cuts and attacks on energy/logistics sites reported
events.implication: Energy and shipping shock raises inflation risks and supports risk_off_flows; spillovers to gas and freight.

events.title: US embassy complex in Riyadh hit by drones, Saudi defence ministry says
events.implication: Attack on diplomatic facilities escalates political risk and can trigger further security measures and retaliation.

events.title: US orders some diplomatic staff to leave Bahrain, Iraq and Jordan as Iran conflict escalates
events.implication: Drawdown signals elevated threat environment; can disrupt consular operations and business travel across key hubs.

events.title: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz closed and threatens ships attempting to transit
events.implication: Even partial closure can disrupt ~20% of global oil flows and LNG shipments, sharply lifting freight, insurance and oil risk premia.

events.title: Fuel tanker Athe Nova reported hit by drones and burning in Strait of Hormuz
events.implication: Attack on a tanker reinforces physical risk to maritime flows; increases chance of shipping stand-down and insurance withdrawal.

events.title: Saudi Aramco shuts Ras Tanura refinery after drone strike, sources say
events.implication: Temporary shutdown at a key refining/export hub adds upside risk to refined products and crude differentials; raises regional infrastructure vulnerability.

events.title: Marine insurers cancel war-risk cover as Iran conflict intensifies
events.implication: Withdrawal/pricing of war-risk cover can reduce voyage availability and push tanker/container rates higher, feeding inflation and delivered energy costs.

events.title: Global oil and gas shipping costs surge to records amid Hormuz risk
events.implication: Record freight and insurance costs tighten effective supply and lift price volatility across crude, LNG and refined products.

events.title: About 10% of global container fleet caught in Hormuz backup, shipping CEO says
events.implication: Container delays amplify supply-chain disruptions beyond energy, pressuring goods inflation and corporate margins.

events.title: AWS reports outages after UAE data center struck by objects
events.implication: Data-center disruption can ripple into payments, trading, and logistics, adding to risk-off sentiment.

events.title: Kuwait intercepts hostile drones on third day of Iran retaliatory strikes
events.implication: Sustained drone threat keeps regional air defenses on high alert; raises risk to energy and base-adjacent assets.

events.title: Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz grinds to near halt; large backlog of tankers and cargo vessels
events.implication: Near-halt at a chokepoint for ~1/5 of global oil/LNG raises supply and freight/insurance risks.

events.title: Hundreds of ships reported stranded/anchored around Hormuz; war-risk cover cancellations reported
events.implication: Insurance withdrawals and congestion can choke physical exports even if production continues.

events.title: Iranian missile strikes on commercial vessels
events.implication: Commercial-vessel strike risk raises odds of prolonged Hormuz disruption and higher war-risk premia.

events.title: Suspension of shipping operations through the Strait of Hormuz
events.implication: Carrier suspensions and traffic restrictions tighten effective supply of freight capacity and slow Gulf energy exports.

events.title: Hackers hit Iranian apps and websites alongside U.S.-Israeli strikes; internet connectivity drops reported
events.implication: Cyber activity increases operational uncertainty and raises risk of retaliatory cyber actions against Western and regional targets.

events.title: Commercial shipping disrupted as Iran says navigation through Strait of Hormuz halted; multiple tanker incidents reported
events.implication: Higher freight/insurance costs and severe energy supply-chain disruption risk; supports oil_up_risk.

events.title: Maersk pauses Trans-Suez sailings and major lines reroute around Cape; Hormuz crossings suspended
events.location_name: Suez Canal / Bab el-Mandeb / Strait of Hormuz
events.implication: Reroutes extend voyage times, tighten vessel availability, and raise shipping costs; compounds energy market stress via logistics constraints.

events.title: Hackers hit Iranian apps and websites after US-Israeli strikes
events.implication: Cyber spillover increases operational risk for financial and logistics systems; can worsen uncertainty and raise defensive spending.

events.title: Hackers target Iranian apps and websites following U.S.-Israeli strikes
events.implication: Cyber spillover risk can affect financial infrastructure and critical services; adds to risk premia.

events.title: Hackers hit Iranian apps and websites after U.S.-Israeli strikes
events.implication: Elevated cyber activity can increase operational risk for financial/telecom services and signal escalation beyond kinetic domains.

events.title: US and Israel launch pre-emptive strikes on Iran
events.implication: Marks escalation to direct interstate conflict; raises probability of retaliation against regional bases, shipping and energy infrastructure.

events.title: Iran fires missiles at Gulf cities after US-Israeli strikes
events.implication: Direct attacks on Gulf states increase regional spillover risk and elevate concerns about energy and logistics continuity.

events.title: Houthis signal potential resumption of Red Sea shipping attacks after U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran
events.implication: Red Sea risk adds an additional routing/insurance shock on top of Hormuz disruption.

events.title: US expands Iran-related sanctions targeting shadow fleet and supply networks
events.implication: Tightens enforcement risk around Iranian petroleum logistics and procurement; can redirect flows and increase compliance costs for shippers/traders.

events.title: U.S. expands Iran-related sanctions targeting shadow fleet vessels and networks enabling illicit petroleum sales and weapons programs
events.implication: Sanctions tightening can constrain marginal Iranian oil/logistics capacity and elevate compliance/insurance risk.

events.title: U.S. Treasury issues new Iran-related sanctions (non-proliferation/related designations)
events.implication: Sanctions raise compliance costs and constrain Iran-linked shipping and oil logistics.

events.title: Israel continues strikes on targets in Tehran amid expanding regional exchanges (live reporting)
events.implication: Sustained strikes heighten escalation dynamics and raise probability of further retaliation affecting Gulf shipping and energy infrastructure.

events.title: Intensified US-Israeli bombing reported across Tehran as war entered day six
events.implication: Sustained strike tempo raises escalation and retaliation risk. Keeps risk premium embedded in energy and shipping markets.

events.title: Iran vowed revenge after US torpedo attack sank an Iranian warship off Sri Lanka
events.implication: Signals potential geographic expansion of conflict risk beyond the Gulf. Raises global security risk premia.

events.title: Iranian state television hacked; opposition figure Reza Pahlavi aired
events.implication: Information warfare heightens internal instability risk and raises probability of retaliatory cyber activity.

events.title: US military said it would expand strikes deeper inland into Iranian territory
events.implication: Official guidance toward expanded target sets increases escalation risk and supports sustained risk premia.
